meaning: n.米甸人(基督教<<圣经>>中所载的一个阿拉伯游牧部落的成员) adj.米甸人的
examples: They also captured two of the Midianite leaders, Oreb and Zeeb.
God gave Oreb and Zeeb, the Midianite leaders, into your hands.
And the name of the Midianite woman who was put to death was Cozbi daughter of Zur, a tribal chief of a Midianite family.
